title: heteropogon contortus var. allionii
intro: Heteropogon contortus var. allionii, also known as Allion's grass or knotgrass, is a plant species belonging to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Heteropogon contortus var. allionii include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating digestive issues. The plant is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or powder for various herbal remedies.
